Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $200 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (2% odds) on crude reach $200. Closes in ~1mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $85 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (30%) that crude drop below $85. Closes in 2d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $80 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (6% odds) on crude drop below $80. Closes in 2d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Trade & Policy.title: US x China tariff agreement by June 30?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Tariffs directly impact export demand for US grains -- a driver of basis and futures.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.
